unresolved_issues: Exact variant boundary between US_DNGS15_SW and neighboring DNGS15 variants requires human review.
Wage Phillips curve and consumption Euler equation should be PDF-checked for OCR artifacts.
Flexible-price comparison system is represented compactly rather than expanded equation-by-equation.
Steady-state constants are from implementation cross-check because no local appendix normalization exists.
